name: Meatball Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. (205 degrees C).
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Shape mixture into 1-inch meatballs.
4. Place meatballs on greased baking sheets and bake for 10 to 15 minutes until browned.
5. Remove immediately from the oven and drain on paper towels.
6. When cooled, place about 30 meatballs each into five 1-quart containers, leaving 1/2-inch space at the top.
7. Seal and label containers.
8. Freeze. Use within 3 months. Makes about 144 meatballs.
